projects.title: NullID
projects.description: Offline-first security workbench for hashing, redaction, sanitization, encryption, secure notes, and workflow verification with zero runtime backend dependency.
projects.problem: Sensitive cleanup, verification, and safe-sharing tasks were scattered across ad-hoc utilities, which made local-first handling inconsistent and slowed incident prep.
projects.role: Designed and built the React + TypeScript workbench, local CLI companion, security UX safeguards, and verifiable release packaging.
architecture: Browser UI and local CLI share an offline-first security workflow model
Inspectable workflow packages support safe-share and incident handoff
On-device storage and no runtime API calls keep sensitive processing local
projects.outcome: Turned fragmented security utilities into one local-first workbench for hashing, sanitization, encrypted notes, and evidence-ready sharing.

impactMetrics.label: focused security modules in the current workbench
local CLI commands aligned with browser workflows
runtime external services required for core workflows

ru.title: NullID
ru.description: Офлайн-ориентированный security workbench для хеширования, редактирования, очистки, шифрования, защищенных заметок и проверки workflow-пакетов без runtime-бэкенда.

fa.title: نال‌آی‌دی
fa.description: میزکار امنیتی آفلاین‌محور برای هش‌گیری، ریداکشن، پاک‌سازی، رمزنگاری، یادداشت امن و بررسی بسته‌های workflow بدون وابستگی به بک‌اند در زمان اجرا.

image.alt: Preview of the redesigned NullID security workbench

projects.title: NullCal
projects.description: Scheduling and planning automation built to reduce repetitive coordination work and improve execution consistency.
projects.problem: Planning and follow-up work depended on manual reminders, causing deadline drift and inconsistent execution.
projects.role: Built scheduling automation flows, reminder orchestration, and operational guardrails to keep planning predictable.
architecture: Event-driven scheduling layer for recurring checkpoints
Task-state persistence with deterministic retry-safe updates
Notification and reporting hooks for planning visibility
projects.outcome: Converted manual coordination into an automation-assisted routine that improved consistency and reduced follow-up overhead.

impactMetrics.label: less manual coordination work during weekly planning
average weekly time saved via automation workflows
critical sprint checkpoints missed in simulated releases

ru.title: NullCal
ru.description: Автоматизация планирования и расписаний для снижения повторяющейся координационной работы и повышения стабильности исполнения.

fa.title: نال‌کال
fa.description: اتوماسیون زمان‌بندی و برنامه‌ریزی برای کاهش کارهای تکراری هماهنگی و افزایش ثبات اجرا.

projects.title: PacMan
projects.description: Feature-rich PacMan browser game with arcade-accurate ghost logic, daily challenges, replay tools, and mobile-friendly controls.
projects.problem: The redesign aimed to move beyond a simple clone by preserving arcade feel while adding replayability, accessibility, and responsive multi-input play.
projects.role: Implemented the gameplay systems, AI behaviors, replay/debug tooling, accessibility settings, and responsive control surfaces.
architecture: Deterministic fixed-step loop keeps gameplay, replay capture, and debugging in sync
Ghost AI, scoring, challenge rules, and phase state machine stay modular
Responsive control layers support keyboard, touch, virtual stick, and gamepad input
projects.outcome: Shipped a much deeper browser game experience with authentic arcade behavior, modern accessibility controls, and repeatable test coverage.

impactMetrics.label: arcade-accurate ghost personalities with distinct targeting rules
input paths across keyboard, touch, swipe, virtual stick, and gamepad
target supported by frame-pacing guardrails and playtest coverage

ru.title: PacMan
ru.description: Расширенная браузерная версия PacMan с аркадно-точной логикой призраков, daily challenge, replay-инструментами и mobile-friendly управлением.

fa.title: پک‌من
fa.description: نسخه‌ای غنی از بازی PacMan در مرورگر با منطق دقیق ارواح، چالش‌های روزانه، ابزارهای بازپخش و کنترل‌های مناسب موبایل.

image.alt: Preview of the redesigned PacMan browser game
